examples: Traffic was chaotic during rush hour.
Moving to a new city can be chaotic.
context: I'm looking for Bath & Body Works now and I somehow ended up in the food court but yeah it's really chaotic it's like amazing here. There's so many people and I keep getting lost. I was walking around in circles for quite a while trying to find this store and it was so hard not to get tempted by all of the delicious looking pastries along the way but I finally found what I'm looking for.

It's so rainy and it's making my hair frizzy and it is just chaotic going outside. My umbrella broke and people kept bumping into me with their umbrellas so it just kind of made me laugh because it's a very different day from what I imagined but I'm staying optimistic and so far it's been a decent day and I'm excited for tonight because I'm gonna meet up with a friend. Until then I'll just stay home. I'll read a little bit, work a little bit and just relax until I see my friend.

examples: I love staying in my cozy bed on rainy days.

context: Brunch was fantastic and it definitely hit the spot. I was careful not to over-indulge too much so I've got leftovers. This will be perfect for breakfast tomorrow. On my perfect day usually I would go for a long walk outside but since the weather is kind of bad today and it's been raining on and off all day today I'm going to go to the mall. I don't usually love shopping but I know at this department store they recently got an American brand called Bath & Body Works which carries a lot of lotions and body washes but I love their candles especially their seasonal candles so they have a lot of false sense like apple pie and pumpkin and all kinds of cozy sense so I want to buy a candle and maybe I'll check out a bookstore there too. Do I need a new book? No but do I want a new book? Yes.

examples: This song makes me feel nostalgic.
I'm feeling nostalgic about my college days.
The old photos made us all nostalgic.
context: It makes me feel very nostalgic so I'm excited to go eat some pancakes. I'm out of breath because I ran to catch this bus. I did not want to get stuck in the rain. Luckily the driver was so sweet and waited for me to catch up. Thank you. I made it to the pancake house. It really makes me think of home. Look at how many different kinds of pancakes they have. Crazy. I love that you can get your eggs cooked in many different ways here. It's so specific. I personally usually like over easy eggs. Can I get the ever popular jaw? Can I have just a little bit of cheese? True to American diner style. They serve bottomless coffee. I love it. I take my coffee black because I like it a little bit bitter. It's perfect on a rainy day. The ever popular Joe is my go-to meal at this restaurant. I love it because there are savory eggs and sweet pancakes so you get the best of both worlds. It's funny because even the portion sizes here remind me of home. They give you so much food. I also love that they give you so many condiments. They have maple syrup, hot sauce, ketchup, any kind of condiment or sauce that you would need. Let's try the pancakes first. I prefer classic pancakes with lots of maple syrup. The pancakes are so fluffy. I like a little bit of Tabasco sauce on my eggs.
